description: Fail-closed policy correctly rejected task that failed due to environment mismatch

gate_1_receipt_verification.reason: receipt status must be success, got: failure

fail_closed_verification.expected_behavior: Block failed tasks from passing verification
fail_closed_verification.actual_behavior: Both gates correctly rejected the failed task
fail_closed_verification.verdict: CORRECT - Fail-closed policy worked as designed

lessons_learned: Environment mismatch (Windows vs Linux) causes task failure
Linux-specific commands (ss, free, uptime) cannot run on Windows
Dual gate system correctly prevents failed tasks from passing
Receipt status must be 'success' for verification to pass

remediation.root_cause: Task executed on wrong environment (Windows instead of CLOUD-ROOT)
remediation.required_action: Re-execute task on correct CLOUD-ROOT environment
